treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient endorses continued right toe pain, but reports that pain and swelling are better than they have been over the past several weeks.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient hospitalized for right toe infection and underwent I&D, and antibiotic treatment.
Patient referred to the ED for further evaluation due to continued pain.
Patient received IV vancomycin and Percocet in the ED.
Patient discharged with a prescription for pain medication.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Follow up with PCP as per discharge instructions.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Pain is expected to improve with time.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient's mental status is clear and coherent; activity status is independent.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient feels that pain and swelling are currently better than they have been over the past weeks.
